'''Reni Wajetta''', a slender, effeminate, sharp-dressed [[Gender/Legends|man]] with an easygoing manner hiding brutal ambition, made a career of blackmailing and bribing the rich and famous from the safety of his [[Crullov City|hometown]]. Ruthless in pressing the advantage, he became more rich and powerful than many of his victims. While he entertained the notion of relocating to a more pleasant environment, he was proscribed by the demands of his career. He compensated by surrounding himself with beautiful women, objets d'art, and [[Airspeeder/Legends|fast speeders]]. Wajetta also had a son, named [[Kurlo]].<ref name="CatCW" />
